Key_Detail: The following documentation is intended to document the intended use and training of the Mine Resistatant
Summary: To: Whom it may Concern From: Fort Smith Police Department Date: January 19, 2015 Ref: MRAP The following documentation is intended to document the intended use and training of the Mine Resistatant Ambush Protection Vehicle, which was allocated to the Fort Smith Police Department, by the United States Government. The Fort Smith Police Department recognizes this vehicle is the Property of the Unite
